name: Sprint 12 — Longaeva Pre-Trial Platform Build
note: Unofficial sprint cut covering merges from June 3 → June 16, 2026. Continues from Sprint 11 (May 15 → June 2). Sprint 7 was the last formal Jira sprint object. Dominated by the Longaeva pre-trial build (epics BH-526 / BH-601 / BH-624) — but the work shipped as reusable platform capability (MCP, OMD-native ingestion, dbt-agent + semantic views, quality-rule library, Slack/notifications, Okta federation, longitudinal monitoring), so it is counted here as the platform sprint. PoC-completeness/scorecard narrative is tracked separately in clients/trials/longaeva/TRACKER.md.

tickets.note: 54 Needs-Refinement are mostly freshly-filed BH-601 golden-case + BH-624 lifecycle backlog (specced, not built). Active work = Done+CodeReview+StagingQC+InProgress = 46.

completion.note: Denominator inflated by backlog grooming; 46 tickets actively worked, 28 sitting in review/QC pipeline ready to land.

team.name: Kuri Chinca
